title: October 21
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 21''' is the 294th day of the year (295th in leap years), with 71 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1933|1933]] – [[Doug Chamberlain]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Carrie Fisher]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Delilah S. Dawson]] is born.
*[[2008]] – [[Millennium Falcon (novel)|''Millennium Falcon'']] published.
*2008 – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' announced.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 7: Dueling Ambitions]]'' published.
*2009 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 46|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 46]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Ezra's Wookiee Rescue]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[Servants of the Empire: Edge of the Galaxy]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[The Rebellion Begins]]'' published.
*2014 – [[Star Wars Insider 153|''Star Wars Insider'' 153]] published.
*2014 – A special limited edition of ''[[The Adventures of Luke Skywalker, Jedi Knight]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 11|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 11]] published.
*2015 – [[Shattered Empire 4|''Shattered Empire'' 4]] published.
*2015 – "[[Relics of the Old Republic]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2018]] – "[[Fuel for the Fire]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – [[Bounty Hunters 6|''Bounty Hunters'' 6]] published.
*[[2021]] – "[[Blurrg (episode)|Blurrg]]" premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com]] YouTube channel.
*2021 – "[[Voorpak (episode)|Voorpak]]" premieres on the StarWarsKids.com YouTube channel.
*[[2025]] – ''[[The Last Order]]'' published.
*2025 – [[The Last Order (audiobook)|''The Last Order'' audiobook]] released.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories Library Edition Volume 1]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation (trade paperback)]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: The Official Crochet Pattern Book]]'' published.
<noinclude>
